name: #265 · 7675ffb97638c235486a34bfb26f9596db67746b · Karol Wojcik · feat: add Thread/sleep, System, File interop to SCI sandbox + codegen→eval round-trip tests

newTests.name:
Ultimate compatibility test: codegen generates Clojure, SCI evaluates it.
   Verifies that ALL codegen output formats produce valid code and that
   the :script format runs correctly in SCI --eval mode. > codegen format generation > generates valid :body format from JSONL

Ultimate compatibility test: codegen generates Clojure, SCI evaluates it.
   Verifies that ALL codegen output formats produce valid code and that
   the :script format runs correctly in SCI --eval mode. > codegen :script format evaluates in SCI > project recording.jsonl generates valid script

Ultimate compatibility test: codegen generates Clojure, SCI evaluates it.
   Verifies that ALL codegen output formats produce valid code and that
   the :script format runs correctly in SCI --eval mode. > codegen :script format evaluates in SCI > NEGATIVE: assertChecked on unchecked box throws in SCI eval

Ultimate compatibility test: codegen generates Clojure, SCI evaluates it.
   Verifies that ALL codegen output formats produce valid code and that
   the :script format runs correctly in SCI --eval mode. > codegen :script format evaluates in SCI > fill script actually changes input value (verified after eval)
